svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 852px; height: 1px; padding-top: 25px; margin-left: 20px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 140px; overflow: hidden; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stack 00: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
Flow:
1. Stacks 01/02 invoke AgentCore Runtime Endpoint (InvokeAgentRuntime API).
2. Runtime loads agent code from Amazon S3 and runs Strands Multimodal Agent in an isolated microVM.
3. Agent uses Amazon Bedrock (Claude Sonnet) for inference and AgentCore Memory for conversation context.
4. For video analysis, the video_analysis tool calls TwelveLabs API (external) via pre-signed S3 URLs.
5. AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store exports runtime ARN, S3 bucket, memory ID, and role ARN for downstream stacks.
